productName: 420 Brand - Milk Chocolate - Rosin - Honeycomb Toffee 100mg THC - Pouch
description: Luxurious chocolate made for slow savoring — deep cocoa, soft sweetness, and a cannabis infusion blended into the recipe like a secret ingredient passed down for generations. It features THC for a classic euphoric lift. Expect a smooth hybrid edible experience — give it time to bloom before taking more.
